nasb.text: So Amasa went to call out the men of Judah, but he delayed longer than the set time which he had appointed him.

esv.text: So Amasa went to summon Judah, but he delayed beyond the set time that had been appointed him.

cnv.text: 亞瑪撒就去召集猶大人。他卻耽延，超過了王限定的日期。

ccb.text: 亚玛撒就去招聚犹大人，但他超过了王所定的期限。
